variants: Eoghan McCauley, born in Silverpine Crossing, currently resides in Greengate Inlet. He is known for his innovative work titled Candlewick Signal Lattice, which has garnered him recognition in his field. Eoghan received the prestigious Candledusk Citation for his contributions to signal technology. In addition to his professional endeavors, he is an active member of the Sunfield Kitewright Assembly, where he shares his passion for kite-making and aerial creativity.
